Name: insert_exercise_logs
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "kind", $3::uuid AS "owner_id") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."exercise_logs" ("id", "kind", "owner_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_0."id", check_mutation_result_0."kind", check_mutation_result_0."owner_id" FROM check_mutation_result_0 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $4::uuid AS "id", $5::text AS "kind", $6::uuid AS "owner_id") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."exercise_logs" ("id", "kind", "owner_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_1."id", check_mutation_result_1."kind", check_mutation_result_1."owner_id" FROM check_mutation_result_1 RETURNING *), mutation_result AS (SELECT mutation_result_0."id", mutation_result_0."kind", mutation_result_0."owner_id" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT mutation_result_1."id", mutation_result_1."kind", mutation_result_1."owner_id" FROM mutation_result_1), check_nested_sets AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $7::int4 AS "reps", mutation_result_0."id" AS "parent_id", mutation_result_0."kind" AS "parent_kind" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT $8::int4 AS "reps", mutation_result_1."id" AS "parent_id", mutation_result_1."kind" AS "parent_kind" FROM mutation_result_1) AS data WHERE true), nested_sets AS (INSERT INTO "public"."exercise_log_sets" ("reps", "parent_id", "parent_kind") SELECT check_nested_sets."reps", check_nested_sets."parent_id", check_nested_sets."parent_kind" FROM check_nested_sets RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_sets)))
